prompt: Please complete the following task using Python:\n Open the 'sheet1' worksheet of the Excel file source.xlsx, and filter the rows where the value in column D is greater than or equal to 8 and less than 8.0010, at the same time, the value in column F should be equal to 18, and the value in column G should be greater than the value of the second row in column G. Copy the values from the filtered rows in column G and paste them into the corresponding cells of the 'sheet1' worksheet in another Excel file target.xlsx.
